title: epipactis pusilla
intro: Epipactis pusilla, also known as the small helleborine, is a species of orchid native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Epipactis pusilla include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use is not well-studied and more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
